arts.ttl: England vs Albania: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: England take on Albania this Friday in 2026 World Cup qualifying, with Thomas Tuchel overseeing his first match. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.

arts.ttl: Tuchel must bear the oppressive weight of England’s history
arts.sum: The new head coach was bullish about his side’s prospects for World Cup qualification, which begins against Albania So, Thomas Tuchel, was the ball over the line? And, yes, we are still talking about it. “I don’t think so,” the new England head coach replied. “But there was no VAR so it stands.” Ah, Thomas. You’re on our side now. And if you want to earn the right to sing the national anthem, you are going to have to do better than this. More seriously, though, as Tuchel throws himself into the challenge of managing England and moving on from the inconvenience of his German passport, this was an instructive exchange. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: England captain Kane feels he is 'taken for granted'
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says he is "taken for granted" and feels people have become "bored" of his goalscoring record.

arts.ttl: England captain Harry Kane believes fans are ‘bored’ by his goalscoring ability
arts.sum: The 31-year-old is the country’s record goalscorer with 69 and shows no signs of slowing down.

arts.ttl: Stick to football: Thomas Tuchel has no interest in 'political statements' as England head coach
arts.sum: In stark contrast to predecessor Gareth Southgate, the new manager will only focus on the pitch

arts.ttl: 'Complicated' but 'honest' - Tuchel's path from barman to England boss
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has been set the challenge of winning the World Cup in 2026. BBC Sport finds out what it is like working with England's new boss.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel ridicules long-held England excuse with emphatic two-word message
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel is refusing to believe his stars will be 'weighed down' by the England shirt - insisting stars will express themselves under his managership

arts.ttl: Harry Kane hails Jordan Henderson England recall and makes Euro 2024 admission
